title: Editing Automations
excerpt:

posts.author: TaylorTedesco (Taylor Tedesco)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

Please please please let us edit automations after they have already been created. And if that is not possible, can we at least duplicate them so that we can edit the duplication and then delete the old automation? The amount of times I need to edit the amount of subitems I have, which then causes me to have to recreate the automation wastes me so much time. I do create a template but that doesn’t really save much time.

Thank you!
